# Alakhsimar Singh

> Software engineer, machine learning researcher, freelance full-stack developer,
> and graphic designer. Final-year B.Tech Computer Science Engineering student at
> Dr. B. R. Ambedkar National Institute of Technology, Jalandhar (2022–2026).

Alakhsimar Singh builds production software, conducts machine learning research
in neuroimaging and computer vision, takes on freelance full-stack client work,
and does graphic/video editing design work. This site is organized into four
lenses, each a distinct profile of the same person.

## Tech
- Software Engineer Intern (Technical Development Program), Optum / UnitedHealth Group,
  Summer 2025. Ranked 1st in the Ireland/India cohort and Global Runner-up among 300+
  interns across 6 countries. Secured a Pre-Placement Offer.
- Smart Notes Platform — a full-stack, AI-native personal knowledge base with
  real-time collaboration (Yjs/Hocuspocus), a hybrid RAG chat pipeline (Groq +
  Cohere reranking), local semantic embeddings, and a 3D knowledge graph.
  Code: https://github.com/AlakhsimarSingh/smart_notes_platform.git
- Skills: Java, C/C++, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js,
  NestJS, Flask, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB.
Page: /tech

## Research (Machine Learning)
- MRP Undergraduate Research Assistant, Harvard Medical School & Massachusetts
  General Hospital (2025–present) — machine learning classification of Jhana
  meditation states from fMRI data.
- Research Intern, Georgia Institute of Technology (2024–2025) — Complex PCA for
  fMRI functional connectivity; work accepted at CNS 2025.
- Publications:
  1. "Machine Learning-Based Classification of Jhana Advanced Concentrative
     Absorption Meditation (ACAM-J) using 7T fMRI" — Kumar, Yang, Singh, Li,
     Sacchet. Under review at PLOS Biology.
     Preprint: https://meditation.mgh.harvard.edu/files/Kumar_26_arXiv.pdf
  2. "On the Role of Range in LiDAR-Based Snow-Pole Detection: A Principled Study
     of Modality Fusion" — Tiwari, Singh, Rafiq, Singh, Seipel, Bavirisetti.
     Under review at MFI 2026.
     Code: https://github.com/AlakhsimarSingh/RangeModalitiesProject
  3. "Network vs ROI Perspectives: Brain Connectivity Analysis using Complex
     Principal Component Analysis" — accepted at CNS 2025 (OCNS), Florence, Italy.
  4. "Visual Physiological Engagement Detection Network" — submitted to Elsevier,
     under peer review.
  5. "Multimodal Engagement Detection Systems and the Unseen Threat to Learner
     Privacy" — book chapter in "The Dark Side of AI: Privacy Invasions and
     Data Vulnerabilities."
- Machine learning focus areas: deep learning, computer vision, CPCA, ensemble
  classifiers, YOLO-based object detection, multimodal sensor fusion.
Page: /research

## Freelance
- Maan Travels — a production full-stack booking platform for a luxury chauffeur
  service, replacing a legacy PHP site. Passwordless device-trust authentication,
  Lighthouse scores improved from 19/75/82/85 to 99/100/100/91.
  Live: https://www.maantravels.com
  Code: https://github.com/AlakhsimarSingh/maan_travels.git
Page: /freelance

## Design
- Editing and graphic design portfolio in progress. Organized 30+ student
  video-editing workshops (2023).
Page: /design
